name: README.md architecture overview
applicability: Chain of Responsibility pipeline pattern is directly relevant to JASON-OS skill/handler composition. The reader/processor/writer taxonomy maps to extract/transform/load.
home_connection: JASON-OS domain 02a (skill architecture), extraction pipeline design

name: Amazon Bedrock Workshop (aws-samples)
applicability: General Bedrock getting-started. SoNash doesn't use Bedrock (uses Claude API directly). Only relevant if evaluating managed AWS AI services.
home_connection: None direct — SoNash uses Anthropic SDK, not Bedrock

name: Prompt template system (prompts/)
applicability: Simple file-based prompt templating with {input_text} substitution. Less sophisticated than home skill system but the PII-aware prompt pattern (T1/T2 tokens) is a useful technique.

name: Amazon Transcribe integration
applicability: Core speech-to-text service. The handler shows the full lifecycle: start job -> poll -> fetch transcript -> cleanup. Directly relevant to T27 media extraction research.

name: Amazon Textract integration
applicability: OCR for images and PDFs. Both sync (images) and async (PDFs) patterns demonstrated. Relevant for document extraction but SoNash doesn't process images currently.

name: Amazon Comprehend PII detection
applicability: PII tokenize/untokenize round-trip pattern. The approach of replacing PII before LLM processing and restoring after is privacy-preserving. Relevant to SoNash's privacy-first mission.
home_connection: SoNash privacy-first architecture, potential PII handling for journal entries

name: Amazon Rekognition labels
applicability: Image label detection. Enriches media metadata with visual content descriptions. Marginally relevant to T27 frame extraction.
home_connection: T27 — frame analysis component of media extraction

name: pytubefix (YouTube download)
applicability: YouTube video/audio download library (1.5K stars, MIT, active). Far richer than bedrock-summarize uses it — has built-in caption/subtitle extraction (SRT), playlist download, channel enumeration, search API with filters, AsyncYouTube for non-blocking use, OAuth for age-restricted content. Caption extraction may eliminate need for Whisper/Transcribe on captioned YouTube videos. Directly relevant to T27 media extraction pipeline.
home_connection: T27 deep-research (YouTube content extraction — caption extraction is the key finding)

name: .env.default multi-model config
applicability: Shows JSONPath-based model request/response mapping — same env config works across Claude v2, Claude 3, and Titan. Pattern for model-agnostic invocation.
